title: Lamar - Idle Vlogger
notes:
Hey all, Lamar here!
Noticed something different? Maybe the UI got a little glow-up, maybe the animations move like butter, or maybe your device just breathed a sigh of relief. You'll never know if you don't download this update - the game’s looking good - just like you on a Saturday night.
Sending you some vlog love. Share it back and like, comment, subscribe!

title: Sunday City: Life Simulator
notes:
Residents of Sunday City, we have great news! You can finally acquire your own apartment! Also, a new ship is arriving in the city, and there’s much more to come.
- Apartment: purchase your own living space, customize it and invite friends over.
- Trophies: show off special awards in your apartment.
- Meowpatra's Tales: a new ship has arrived at the pier, come check it out!
- Season Pass: complete quests, earn tons of rewards, and obtain unique skins.
- Businesses: 15 new businesses await you!

title: Coin Master
notes:
Thanks for playing Coin Master!

In this version, we’ve implemented bug fixes & performance improvements.

We have also implemented our new reward calendar feature - collect your daily rewards! 

Enjoy a world of fun, thrills, and huge rewards right at your fingertips. 

Invite your friends to play Coin Master & get your FREE REWARDS! We also recommend joining our community on Facebook, X, and Instagram for more fun & excitement.

Enjoying Coin Master? Leave a review :)

notes:

2. Shrimpyro→Pyroviathan (T4), Lullelly→Somnrayna (T4).
3. Cozy Farm: Added 2 new crops and improved overall experience.
4. Lowered enemy difficulty, removed T4 Aura animation, fixed Horde Invasion skill rates.
5. Super Drinks from Island Goldrush rounds 1–3; team leader role transfer.
6. Invite friends who haven't logged in; element/class filters; HOT label on Trials.

title: Call of Duty®: Mobile - Garena
notes:
● New MP Mode: Throwable Frenzy; Complete a match to unlock brand-new in-match combat abilities!
● New Scorestreak: VTOL Jet; The VTOL Jet first drops two precision bombs, then returns above the battlefield to defend an area designated by the user.
● New BR Mode Plunder: Treasure Heist; break through layers of Cognitive Reinforcements, and seize the Treasure! 
● New Weapon: FSS Hurricane; The new submachine gun, FSS Hurricane, trades range and power for increased magazine capacity and stability.

title: Coin Master - Board Adventure
notes: Welcome to Coin Master: Board Adventure, where every dice roll takes you closer to riches, revenge, and all-out fun! Collect coins, attack villages, build your empire, and explore wild new boards full of surprises. It's not just a board game - it's a bold adventure!

- General bug fixes.
